productName: Stingers - 2pk .5g Liquid Diamonds Pre-Rolls - Strawberry Kush - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Strawberry Kush and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of strawberry, sweet, and flowery, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
